{"code":"(def merged-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))

(def prs-closing-linear (filter :closes_linear merged-prs))

(def linear-issue-ids (map :closes_linear prs-closing-linear))

(def linear-issues (filter (fn [li] (contains? (set linear-issue-ids) (:id li))) (linear_issues)))

(def not-done-issues (filter #(not= (:state %) "done") linear-issues))
